disclaimer: This AI-assisted result is for guidance only.
scanMedicineDesc: Verify medicine authenticity and view product details
interactionCheckerDesc: Check for drug interactions before combining medications
symptomCheckerDesc: Assess symptoms and get guided health information
medicineScannerDescription: Verify medicine authenticity and view product information. Upload an image or enter the medicine name manually.
errorUploadOrEnter: Please upload an image or enter a medicine name.
recSafe: Medicine verified. No significant concerns identified. Use as directed by a healthcare professional.
recModerate: Verify packaging and source. Ensure purchase from authorized channels.
recSuspicious: Unable to verify authenticity. Exercise caution. Purchase from licensed pharmacies only.
cfDescription: Verify medicine authenticity using packaging image or batch number. AI-assisted verification for guidance only.
cfErrorInput: Please upload an image or enter a batch number.
cfRecVerified: Packaging appears authentic. No signs of tampering detected. Purchase appears to be from verified channels.
cfRecSuspicious: Verification could not confirm authenticity. Do not use. Report to authorities and contact the manufacturer.
cfRecManual: Manual verification required. Contact the manufacturer or verify through official channels before use.
cfDisclaimer: Verification result is AI-assisted and should be confirmed with official manufacturer.
intDescription: Check for potential drug interactions before combining medications. Add two or more medicines to analyze.
intErrorMinTwo: Please add at least 2 medicines before checking interactions.
intDisclaimer: Consult a licensed medical professional before changing medications.
intExpHigh: Warfarin interacts with many medications and can cause serious bleeding risks. Combining it with other drugs requires careful monitoring.
intActHigh: Do not change or add medications without consulting your doctor. Seek immediate medical advice before continuing this combination.
intExpModerate: Aspirin and ibuprofen are both NSAIDs. Taking them together may increase the risk of gastrointestinal bleeding and kidney effects.
intActModerate: Consult a healthcare provider before using both. Consider using paracetamol as an alternative if appropriate.
intExpNone: No significant drug-drug interactions were identified among the listed medications based on this assessment.
intActNone: Continue taking medications as prescribed. Report any new or unusual symptoms to your healthcare provider.
prDescription: Upload a prescription image to extract and view structured details. AI-assisted extraction for guidance only.
name: Name
prNotes: Complete the full course of antibiotics. Avoid alcohol during treatment. Follow up if symptoms persist.
prWarning: Do not exceed recommended dosage. Discontinue and consult doctor if allergic reaction occurs.
prDisclaimer: Extracted prescription details are AI-assisted and should be verified manually.
labDescription: Upload a lab report to view structured results and AI-assisted interpretation. For guidance only.
labSummary: Blood counts are within normal limits. Fasting sugar shows mild elevation suggesting pre-diabetic range. Cholesterol levels are high and require lifestyle modification and medical follow-up.
labDisclaimer: Lab report interpretation is AI-assisted and not a substitute for medical diagnosis.
healthLibraryDescription: Browse health information by category. Select a category to view educational articles.
cd1Desc: Blood pressure basics, risk factors, and lifestyle measures for management.
cd2Desc: Overview of Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes and blood sugar monitoring.
pc1Desc: Recommended screenings by age including blood pressure and cholesterol.
pc2Desc: When and how to wash hands to prevent infections.
n1Desc: Food groups, portion sizes, and nutrition basics.
n2Desc: Iron, vitamin A, iodine, and folate deficiency prevention.
heatMapDescription: Geographical overview of patient case distribution and risk levels.
noAlertsFiltered: No alerts generated for current filters.
allToolsOnline: All tools are online and ready.
symptomCheckerSubtitle: Know when to see a doctor
featuredLibrarySubtitle: Ask health questions in your language · 200+ articles offline
forGuidanceOnly: ⚠️ For guidance only. Always consult a licensed doctor for medical decisions.
aiNotDiagnosis: This is NOT a diagnosis. Always confirm with a qualified doctor.
aiGuidanceOnly: AI-assisted assessment. Consult a doctor for proper diagnosis.
scSymptomsQ: What symptoms does the patient have?
scSymptomsHint: Select all that apply (tap to select)
scOfflineBanner: Will show example assessment. Connect for AI-powered results.
scExampleBanner: Could not reach AI service — showing example assessment. Connect to internet for personalized results.
fq_duration: How long have you had these symptoms?
fq_severity_1: Mild — I can do normal activities
connectToScan: Connect to Wi-Fi to scan medicines. Will work when internet returns.
connectToVerify: This feature needs internet to verify your medicine. Connect and try again.
connectToAnalyze: This feature needs internet to analyse your lab report.
connectToPrescription: This feature needs internet to read your prescription.
aiAssistedScan: AI-assisted scan. Always verify with pharmacist and follow doctor advice.
holdBack: Hold the BACK of the medicine strip/packet — this has composition, batch no., and expiry
holdSteady: Hold phone steady in good light
captureName: Capture the full medicine name and batch number
verifyWithAI: Verify if your medicine is genuine using AI
howToGoodPhoto: 💡 How to take a good photo
photoBackStrip: Photograph the BACK of the strip/packet — this has batch number, composition, and manufacturing details
includeHologram: Include the hologram and batch number
barcodeAccuracy: Enter the barcode for best accuracy
verdict_suspicious_sub: Some checks failed. Ask your chemist.
verdict_counterfeit_sub: Do NOT use. Contact CDSCO helpline: 1800-180-3024
noInternetDesc: This feature needs internet to read your prescription.
prescriptionUploadHint: Upload a photo of your prescription. Our AI will explain each medicine in simple language.
urgentFever: High fever (104F+) that will not reduce with medicine
getExplanations: Get plain-language explanations of your test results
aiAssistedInterpretation: AI-assisted interpretation. Not a substitute for medical diagnosis.
uploadLabPrompt: Upload a lab report to see results
clearPhotoReport: Take a clear photo of your blood test report
prescriptionReaderDesc: Upload a photo of your prescription. Our AI will explain each medicine in simple language.
callEmergency: Call 108 or go to hospital immediately if:
aiAssistedReading: AI-assisted reading. Always follow your doctor's actual instructions.
consultDoctor: Please consult your doctor before taking these medicines together.
highRiskInteraction: High-risk interaction found! Consult your doctor.
tipFullReport: Ensure full report is visible in photo
